title: [question] how to run tests correct?
body:
I'm trying to add the tests for #3767 
But I'm not sure how to run the tests correctly.
Can you add a doc how to do this?

`make test-unit` works if running with `root` but the `tests/test_runner.sh` fails often.

```
not ok 247 bud timestamp compare
# (from function `copy' in file ./helpers.bash, line 182,
#  from function `_prefetch' in file ./helpers.bash, line 141,
#  in test file ./bud.bats, line 2831)
#   `_prefetch alpine' failed
# /github/buildah/src/buildah/tests /github/buildah/src/buildah/tests
# # [checking for: docker.io/library/alpine]
# # [restoring from cache: /var/tmp/buildah-image-cache.1606548 / docker.io/library/alpine]
# Error: determining manifest MIME type for dir:/var/tmp/buildah-image-cache.1606548/docker.io-library-alpine-: open /var/tmp/buildah-image-cache.1606548/docker.io-library-alpine-/manifest.json: no such file or directory
```

comments.body: @Dexus  I use `sudo ./tests/test_runner.sh` but I usually filter tests.
